name: sktime (Unified Time Series ML)
pricing_notes: Open source (BSD-3-Clause); sktime community / Franz Kiraly

performance.notes: Backend-agnostic; sklearn-compatible; some estimators delegate to external libs

agent_readiness.notes: Unified sklearn-compatible time series ML. from sktime.forecasting.arima import AutoARIMA. from sktime.forecasting.exp_smoothing import ExponentialSmoothing. forecaster = AutoARIMA(). forecaster.fit(y_train). y_pred = forecaster.predict(fh=[1,2,3]). from sktime.classification.interval_based import TimeSeriesForestClassifier. from sktime.regression.interval_based import TimeSeriesForestRegressor. from sktime.clustering.k_means import TimeSeriesKMeans. from sktime.transformations.series.difference import Differencer. Pipeline: ForecastingPipeline([('transform', Differencer()), ('model', AutoARIMA())]). Evaluation: mean_absolute_percentage_error(y_test, y_pred). 300+ estimators.

gotchas: Data format uses pd.Series with DatetimeIndex — must conform to sktime's inner type
Forecasting horizon (fh) argument is required and uses relative or absolute indexing
Some estimators require optional dependencies (pmdarima, statsmodels, pytorch)
Large library with many sub-packages — import paths can be non-obvious
aeon project forked from sktime — some estimators migrated
best_when: Unified interface for time series forecasting, classification, regression, clustering
sklearn-compatible pipelines with time series transformers and models
Comparing many forecasting algorithms under a consistent API
When AutoARIMA, ETS, TBATS, and deep learning models should share same interface
avoid_when: High-frequency streaming time series (use river for online learning)
When single specialized library is better (Prophet, statsforecast, neuralforecast)
summary: sktime provides 300+ unified sklearn-compatible time series ML estimators. AutoARIMA, ExponentialSmoothing, TimeSeriesForestClassifier. forecaster.fit(y_train).predict(fh=[1,2,3]). ForecastingPipeline. 5 tasks: forecasting, classification, regression, clustering, annotation. BSD-3 by sktime community. Best for comparing many TS algorithms under one API. DatetimeIndex format required. fh argument required. Optional deps for some estimators. aeon fork has some migrated estimators.
